report.title: Gauntlet Minigames - QA Version Pre-Release V1.0.0
report.source_file: Gauntlet Minigames - QA Version Pre-Release V1.0.0.pdf

testing_session.test_scope: Level progression, UI, puzzle logic, combat behavior, multiplayer flow, and session recovery

severity_guide.Critical: Blocks progression, causes softlock, breaks level completion, or prevents the game from continuing properly.
severity_guide.High: Major gameplay issue that strongly affects player experience, level logic, combat, or multiplayer stability.
severity_guide.Medium: Noticeable issue, but the game can still continue. Usually related to clarity, balance, or player guidance.
severity_guide.Low: Minor visual, text, formatting, or polish issue.

issues.title: Level Indicator UI Inconsistency
finding: The Level 1 indicator does not look fully consistent with the rest of the level indicators.
expected_result: Level indicator format should stay consistent across all levels.

issues.title: UI Text Style Inconsistency
finding: Some text in Level 4 uses a different font style compared to the other levels.
expected_result: Text style, wording, capitalization, and formatting should follow the same standard as other levels.

issues.title: Button Input Delay
finding: Button input feels delayed in Level 4.
This may be related to a Minecraft issue.
expected_result: Button interaction should feel responsive.
If the delay cannot be fully avoided, the level should give clearer feedback after input.

issues.title: Player Can Get Stuck in Map Corner
finding: Players can get stuck in one of the map corners, on the left side of the spawn gate.
expected_result: The map should not allow players to get trapped.
Adjust the area by removing the leaves block.

issues.title: Completion Detection Bug
finding: When the player drops and hits the grass instead of the water, the level can still be marked as completed.
After that, the player is sent back to the lobby instead of continuing properly.
expected_result: The level should only complete when the player lands in the correct area.
If the landing is invalid, completion should not trigger.

issues.title: Wrong Door Punishment Adjustment
finding: Wrong door punishment needs to be adjusted so the penalty feels more balanced.
expected_result: First wrong door: apply Slowness only.
Third wrong door: send the player back to the Spawn Level.

issues.title: Teleport Position After Finish Needs Adjustment
finding: After finishing the level, the player is placed near the spawn door instead of being positioned toward the next door.
expected_result: After completion, the player should be teleported closer to the next level entrance.

issues.title: Clue and Lever Logic Mirroring Position
finding: The clue giver and lever setup are not aligned.
The current logic feels like it is using a mirrored direction, which makes the clue confusing.
expected_result: The clue and lever setup should match directly, unless the mirror mechanic is intentionally part of the puzzle.

issues.title: Lightning Damage Not Working
finding: Lightning does not damage the player.
expected_result: Lightning should damage the player if it is intended to be part of the level hazard.

issues.title: Missing Parkour Blocks
finding: Parkour blocks are missing in Arena 2.
Other arenas may need to be checked as well.
expected_result: All required parkour blocks should be present in every arena.

issues.title: Void Fall Does Not Always Reset Player
finding: Sometimes when the player falls into the void, the player does not die.
The player is also not always teleported back to the spawn door.
expected_result: Falling into the void should always trigger death or teleport reset.

issues.title: Torch Usage Information Needed
finding: The game does not clearly tell the player that the torch can be used for lighting.
expected_result: Add a short hint when the player holds the torch.
suggested_text_or_behavior: Hold the torch to light your path.

issues.title: Information to Answer the Clue Is Too Direct
finding: The current clue for the answering code is too obvious.
expected_result: Replace the information with a less direct version.
The information should guide the player without giving the answer too clearly.

issues.title: Valve Reset Information Needed
finding: Players need clearer information when the valve combination is wrong.
expected_result: If the combination is wrong, show a short message telling the player to reset all valves to OFF before trying a new combination.

issues.title: Tools Needed
finding: Players can lose required blocks if misplaced, which may affect progression.
expected_result: Provide tools to prevent progression issues: Axe and Pickaxe.

issues.title: Cannot Build on Required Build Area
finding: Players cannot place blocks on the intended build object.
expected_result: Players should be able to build on the correct build object so the objective can be completed normally.

issues.title: Entity Count Does Not Match Completion State
finding: The exit door opens even though it still shows that one entity remains.
expected_result: Entity count and exit door logic should be synchronized.
The exit should only open when the objective state is correct.

issues.title: Player Cannot Be Damaged by Entity
finding: Entities are not damaging the player.
expected_result: Entity attacks should damage the player normally.

issues.title: Entity Count Does Not Match Completion State
finding: The exit door opens even though it still shows that one entity remains.
expected_result: Entity count and exit door logic should be synchronized.
The exit should only open when the objective state is correct.

issues.title: Lever Challenge Needs Submit Flow
finding: The current lever challenge gives information too quickly after each wrong lever input.
expected_result: Player sets the lever combination based on the clue first.
When the player feels the combination is correct, they can press the Submit button.
If correct, the challenge is completed.
If wrong, show a wrong indicator and trigger thunder punishment until the player dies.
issues.reason: This keeps the puzzle clear while preventing instant feedback from giving away the answer too early.

issues.title: Final Boss Encounter Request
finding: After all mini quests are completed, the final part of the level needs a stronger ending challenge.
expected_result: Spawn the final encounter after all mini quests are completed.
Add 1 Final Boss.
Add 4 supporting minion entities.

issues.title: Respawn Location Bug
finding: When player died, player respawn back to lobby.
expected_result: Player must respawn at the spawn level 15.

issues.title: Action Bar Message After Level Completion
finding: After level completion, the next action is not always clear enough for players.
expected_result: Add a clearer Action Bar message after the objective is completed.
suggested_text_or_behavior: Please go to the door right now.

issues.title: UI Remains After Exiting Game
finding: UI can remain visible or become stuck after the player exits the game.
expected_result: All active UI should close properly when the player leaves or exits the game session.

issues.title: Inconsistent Text Font
expected_result: Consistent text font for all UI and texts.

issues.title: Player Disconnect Can Block Progression
finding: If one player suddenly disconnects, the remaining players may not be able to continue.
The next-level door can become stuck.
expected_result: Remaining players should still be able to continue the game even if one player disconnects.

issues.title: Arena Session Needs Recovery Timer
finding: When a player disconnects, the arena session can become broken and cannot continue properly.
expected_result: Start a 3-minute recovery timer after a player disconnects.
If no player returns within 3 minutes, terminate the arena session, reset the arena, and make it available for a new session.
